name: Fat-Free Hot Fudge Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan, stir together the sugar, cocoa powder, cornstarch, and evaporated skim milk.
2. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly until the sauce thickens and becomes bubbly.
3. Continue cooking for an additional 2 minutes.
4. Remove from heat and stir in 1 teaspoon vanilla extract.
5. (For a sugar-free version, omit the sugar at the beginning and stir in NutraSweet with the vanilla at the end.)
